description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a short-sleeved collared shirt and knee-length checkered shorts. The figure has a muscular build with defined arms and legs, and is depicted in a walking motion with one leg forward and one arm slightly extended. The head is cleanly shaven on the sides with a short hairstyle on top, and the facial features are neutral. The figure wears ankle-high socks and no visible shoes, giving a relaxed, everyday appearance. The clothing fits snugly, emphasizing the natural contours of the body. No accessories or carried objects are present, and the overall look is modern and informal.
description: A casually dressed adult male figure in a collared shirt and checkered shorts, depicted mid-walk with a short hairstyle and ankle socks. The posture and attire suggest a relaxed, everyday urban setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared shirt, checkered shorts, and forward stride with arms slightly apart.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the walking motion, arm swing, and profile of the head and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, shorts, and both arms, with the head facing forward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite arm swing and leg movement, as well as the side profile of the head.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved collared shirt and knee-length casual shorts
